creator: inagaki@tg.rim.or.jp
text:
This port is the renewal of japanese/vfxdvik.
The name of port is changed to xdvik-vflib from this version.
Therefore, please delete japanese/vfxdvik at the time of commit.

Color DVI is able to be displayed by using anti-aliasing from this version.
Also the calling method of dvipsk is changed.

Fix:
